# Known DocC URL segments for docs.21.dev
# Generated by scanning: find Websites/docs-21-dev/documentation -name index.html | \
#   sed 's|.*/documentation/||; s|/index.html||' | tr '/' '\n' | sort -u
#
# This file is checked into CI. When new symbols are added to any archive,
# re-run the scan command above and update this file. The knownNames CI test
# will fail if any multi-word compound segment is missing from the knownNames map
# (specifically, segments matching compound suffixes: key, secret, digest, error,
# signature, proof, started, only, kit).
#
# Single-word segments (e.g., "signing", "context") are handled by capitalize-first
# fallback and do NOT need knownNames entries. Only multi-word compounds that
# would produce incorrect casing under fallback need entries.
#
# After Phase 4 of the swift-tor + indexability-registry refactor, knownNames
# entries are sourced from `Resources/docs-21-dev/external-archives.json`
# (per-archive `knownNames` plus `globals.knownNames`).
#
# Lines starting with # are comments. Blank lines are ignored.

# Modules
p256k
zkp
event
openssl
tor

# Compound names — P256K (require knownNames entries)
int256
keyagreement
privatekey
publickey
xonlypublickey
sharedsecret
sha256digest
partialsignature
cryptokitasn1error
cryptokitmetaerror
surjectionproof
rangeproof
gettingstarted

# Compound names — Event (require knownNames entries)
eventloop
serversocket
socketaddress
socketerror

# Compound names — OpenSSL (require knownNames entries)
opensslerror
base64url
opensslcontext

# Compound names — Tor (require knownNames entries)
torclient
torsession
torcontrolclient
torconfiguration
torerror
torstate
torevent
torcontrolevent
torcontroleventmessage
torloglevel
addonionresponse
bootstrapstatus
controlreply
controlsocket
controlprotocolparser
hostport
onionservice
onionportmapping
onionporttarget
onionkeyspec
portpolicy
urlsessionconfiguration

# Single-word segments (handled by capitalize-first fallback)
signing
context
ecdsa
schnorr
recovery
musig
pedersen
generator
tag
foundation
swift
sha256
ssl
rsa
